verdict: PARTIAL — coef=-0.5794, p=0.46 (above α=0.1); direction inconclusive
falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if β1 (flat-tax indicator) is positive and significant at p<0.10 and the post-reform decade mean growth gap vs synthetic counterfactual is at least 0.3 pp/year. PARTIAL if positive and significant in FE but not in synthetic-control estimates. REFUTED if β1 is negative and significant at p<0.10. INFORMATIVE: excluding Russia and Estonia should not eliminate the positive sign; if it does, the result is driven by two dominant cases.
